description_long: This is a weathered, boxy van with a dark, rusted exterior and a large, faded American flag painted across the roof. The body shows significant wear, including scratches, rust patches, and graffiti, giving it a distressed, post-apocalyptic appearance. The windows are opaque and appear cracked or heavily frosted, obscuring the interior. The van has four wheels, with the tires and rims also showing signs of age and use. The front and rear both feature double doors, with the rear doors having visible hinges and the front grille partially damaged. The overall look suggests a utilitarian cargo van that has seen extensive use in harsh urban environments.
description: A heavily weathered, rusted van with a large American flag on the roof, cracked windows, and graffiti on the sides.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the American flag on the roof, graffiti, rust patches, and two side windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the double rear doors, cracked windows, and the flag extending to the back edge.
description_view_2: Right side view with similar weathering, a sliding side door seam, and visible rust and graffiti.
description_view_3: Front view showing the damaged grille, cracked windshield, and the flag starting at the front edge of the roof.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
